objects.name: Microsoft Edge security advisory (AV26-476)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-476 Date: May 19, 2026 On May 15, 2026, Microsoft published a security update to address vulnerabilities in the following product: Microsoft Edge Stable Channel - versions prior to 148.0.3967.70 The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web link and apply the necessary update. Bulletin de sécurité Microsoft Edge (AV26-476)
